Meaning.Vi: Giảm giá; cuộc bán hàng; khoản bán
Meaning.En: A reduction in the price of goods or services; an event where goods are sold at reduced prices; the act of selling something.
Meaning.Example: The store is having a spring sale—everything is 30% off!

Situation.Vi: Quần áo được bán với giá rẻ trong tuần lễ giảm giá cuối năm.
Situation.En: Clothing is sold at discounted prices during the year-end clearance sale.

Situation.Vi: Công ty vừa hoàn thành giao dịch bán cổ phần đầu tiên.
Situation.En: The company just completed its first share sale.

Meaning.En: To sell something, especially goods or property; to sell at auction.
Meaning.Example: They decided to sell their old car and buy a new electric one.

Situation.Vi: Nhà đất được bán qua hình thức đấu giá công khai.
Situation.En: The property was sold at a public auction.

Situation.Vi: Cô ấy vừa bán một căn hộ ở trung tâm thành phố.
Situation.En: She just sold an apartment in the city center.
